artPrompt: A small suited figure flinging a catering tray of scraps toward a vast bloated sludge-creature, its murky-green bioluminescent maw rising eagerly amid rusted pipes and bubbling runoff, drifting litter scattering in the air under a bruised stormy sky, mutant overgrowth framing the reckless offering, a tender absurd dread in the diffuse light, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Mayor Throws It a Snack
text:
Put four sludge counters on target creature you control. Then it must attack a player of your choice this turn if able. (The Mayor's plan to appease the monster: feed it, point it at a rival district, hope for the best.)
Draw a card. The press release writes itself.
flavorText: "It's not a monster, it's a tourism opportunity," said the Mayor, throwing it a whole catering tray.
